check_content_excerpt:
On the Kubernetes Master node, run the following command:
kubectl get all,cm -A -o yaml 

Manually review the output for sensitive information.

If any sensitive information is found, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Any sensitive information found must be stored in an approved external Secret store provider or use Kubernetes Secrets (attached on an as-needed basis to pods).
title: Sensitive information must be stored using Kubernetes Secrets or an external Secret store provider.
